name: Best Run Ghost
description: Races you against a semi-transparent ghost of your best progression on each level. Toggle it on or off per level from the pause menu.

ghosts-enabled.name: Enable Ghosts
ghosts-enabled.description: Master switch. When off, no ghosts are shown or recorded anywhere, regardless of per-level settings.

ghost-opacity.name: Ghost Opacity
ghost-opacity.description: How visible the ghost is. Lower is more transparent.

tint-ghost.name: Tint Ghost Blue
tint-ghost.description: Recolor the ghost icon light blue so it's easy to tell apart from your real player.

record-in-practice.name: Record In Practice Mode
record-in-practice.description: Allow practice mode attempts (with checkpoints) to count toward your best progression. Off by default, since practice runs use checkpoints and aren't a fair real attempt.
